name: total-code-recall
description: Semantic code search plugin for Claude Code. Index, update, and search your codebase with local embeddings via Ollama + pgvector.
author: BenjaminSchr

skills.name: code-onboard
skills.description: Index a project's codebase into pgvector for semantic search

skills.name: code-update
skills.description: Update index with new commits since last onboard/update

skills.name: code-overview
skills.description: Structural overview of indexed codebase via entity/relation graph

skills.name: code-explain
skills.description: Hybrid code search with entity graph and hierarchical summaries
